rules.rationale: These exact paths belong only to the read-only generated target tree: aliases, host builder output, migration-only support files, or old generated layout. Their planned removal is an expected deletion, not a portable behavior claim.
These exact paths are emitted by the reviewed common/overlay assembly and are absent from the old generated target tree. They are target packaging additions, not omitted portable behavior.
The empty marker and comment-only stub are legacy hook packaging artifacts; no executable hook behavior is exempted.

These exact Kiro entries were eleven-line host shortcut wrappers. The new target materializer emits the canonical portable implementation once; E3 covers that implementation and the overlay owns host invocation.
